macro.title: Americans hate the 2026 economy - Axios
macro.summary: Americans are still experiencing sticker shock at the price of groceries and other goods due to inflation that happened years ago.

macro.title: Wall Street still loves streaming, but are its affections well placed? - CNBC
macro.summary: While streaming continues to drive media stocks, especially around quarterly earnings, it's not clear when it will start driving profits for smaller players.

macro.title: Read OpenAI’s latest internal memo about beating the competition — including Anthropic - The Verge
macro.summary: OpenAI’s chief revenue officer, Denise Dresser, sent a four-page memo to employees about the company’s strategic direction and competition with Anthropic.

macro.title: Already under financial pressure, Midwest soybean farmers are squeezed further by tariffs, Iran war - AP News
macro.summary: Midwest soybean farmers are facing an array of compounding issues. Costs, such as equipment, have crept up over time while soybean prices have stayed low. Tariffs levied by the Trump administration last year and the resulting monthslong trade war with China i…
